task_objective: Add Excel support and optimize dependencies.
design_decisions: Added 'fastexcel' to core dependencies to enable high-performance Excel parsing via Polars/Calamine.
Moved 'ydata-profiling' to dev dependencies as it is only used for parity testing.
Implemented 'ProfileReport.from_excel' using the 'calamine' engine for maximum speed.
Added 'profile_excel' convenience function to the top-level API.
results: Direct Excel profiling is now supported via ProfileReport.from_excel('file.xlsx'). The project dependency footprint for production users is reduced by removing ydata-profiling from core.
